This was a solid breakdown of the ORB, especially the part about waiting for the close and then using the retest instead of just jumping in on the first break. The way you tied in fair value gaps with the range makes it feel more structured and not just a basic breakout play. I’ve been using the first light beacon alongside this to see if that expansion out of the 9:30 range is actually backed by real order flow or just a liquidity grab. The reminder about higher time frame liquidity like the previous day’s high is huge too, that’s where most people get trapped.

Wonderful tutorial but I found this strategy unprofitable. I backtested one year of data. Ive been looking for entry every 9:30 AM as the tutorial suggest. My Criteria was strong BOS of high or low. if its BAG I dont wait for retest in the FVG. If you planning to backtest like I did, dont even try . Anyhow Can someone share other methods to make it profitable? I can count on my finger how many the retest has happened in whole year and no lot of retest doesnt happen. and setup unlikely to happen if the m15 candle was a consolidation or DOji its likely sweep any side and reverse to get out consolidation.
